test.title: Test
test.description: A generated test with questions and configuration.

subject.description: The subject of the test (e.g., Khmer, Math).

grade.description: The grade level of the test.

config.description: The configuration used to generate the test.

sourceText.description: The source text used for generation.

uid.description: The UID of the user who created the test.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the test was created.
